title: Navigating Family Relationships When You Become Jewish
title_zh: 皈依犹太教后如何处理家庭关系
title_he: ניווט יחסי משפחה כאשר אתה נעשה יהודי
description: Sensitive guidance for maintaining loving relationships with non-Jewish family members during and after conversion.
author: Torah Light Team
image_description: Chinese brushstroke (水墨) landscape: two paths merging at bridge over stream. Traditional family home one side, Jewish home with mezuzah other side. Figure on bridge between worlds. Soft grays and sepias with gold highlights. Misty mountains background. Traditional shan shui style, contemplative mood.
